filesModified.purpose: Updated chevron icon from 20px to 24px per Figma spec
Added grain texture overlay with mix-blend-mode: color-dodge and opacity 8%, added aria-label fallback for empty title
Added grain texture overlay to match PHP output, synced z-index classes
Forced decorative alt='' on background images since they are behind gradient overlays
Removed unused Appender import to fix linting error

warnings: Asset size limit warnings (339 KiB editor.js)

syncStatus.details: TSX and PHP both updated with texture overlay, z-index classes, and consistent structure

variations: Primary Variation - Dropdown Behavior: First Item

bugFixes.bug: Chevron icon size - 20px instead of Figma's 24px
bugFixes.approach: Updated IconChevron.svg viewBox and dimensions from 20x20 to 24x24. Scaled path coordinates by 1.2x (24/20). Path changed from 'M5 7.5L10 12.5L15 7.5' to 'M6 9L12 15L18 9'.

bugFixes.bug: Texture overlay missing on QuickNavigation background
bugFixes.approach: Added inline SVG noise pattern using feTurbulence filter as data URI background-image on overlay div. Applied mix-blend-mode: color-dodge with opacity: 0.08. Implemented in both PHP and TSX with z-index layering to ensure content sits above overlay.

bugFixes.bug: Background images use media library alt text instead of empty alt for decorative images
bugFixes.approach: Added 'alt' => '' to wp_get_attachment_image() call in Hero.php. Background images are decorative (behind gradient overlays) per WCAG accessibility guidelines.

bugFixes.bug: QuickNavigation select has no accessible name when title is empty
bugFixes.approach: Added fallback aria-label='Navigation' when title is empty. Changed from aria-label='<?php echo esc_attr( $title ); ?>' to aria-label='<?php echo esc_attr( ! empty( $title ) ? $title : 'Navigation' ); ?>'.

accessibilityImprovements: Background images now use alt='' for decorative context
QuickNavigation select has fallback aria-label when title is empty
